mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, real_name, email, phone, role, status, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
